zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Milbourne於大約1474年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾波吉爾時，她的父親Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire40歲，母親Jane Baskerville36歲。她和Sir Thomas Monington至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1527年3月29日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯享年54歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Milbourne于大约1474年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾波吉爾时，她的父亲Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire40岁，母亲Jane Baskerville36岁。她和Sir Thomas Monington至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1527年3月29日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯享年54岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾聖 布利亞維爾斯。

nameMeanings.name: Milbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Milburn
meanings: English (Northumberland, Cumberland and Durham): habitational name from any of the places in Westmorland, Northumberland, Somerset, Dorset or Wiltshire, all derived from Old English myln ‘mill’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. There has been some confusion with Melbourne .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Milbourne was born about 1474, in Burghill, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, was 40 and her mother, Jane Baskerville, was 36. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Thomas Monington. She died on 29 March 1527, in St Briavels, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in St Briavels, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Milbourne est née environ 1474, à Burghill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Jane Baskerville, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Thomas Monington. Elle est décédée le 29 mars 1527, à St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Milbourne um 1474 in Burghill, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire 40 und ihre Mutter Jane Baskerville 36. Sie hatte mit Sir Thomas Monington mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 29. März 1527 im Alter von 54 Jahren in St Briavels, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Briavels, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Milbourne è nata il circa 1474 nel Burghill, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Jane Baskerville, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Sir Thomas Monington. Morì il 29 marzo 1527, nel St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a St Briavels, Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Milbourneが約1474年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブルギルで生まれた時，父Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshireは40歳，母Jane Baskervilleは36歳であった。彼女はSir Thomas Moningtonとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1527年3月29日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスト ブリエイベルズで54歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスト ブリエイベルズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Milbourne(이)가 대략 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 버그힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Baskerville(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Sir Thomas Monington(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1527년 3월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 스트 브리아벨스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 스트 브리아벨스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Milbourne nasceu aproximadamente 1474, em Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Jane Baskerville, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Sir Thomas Monington. Ela faleceu em 29 de março de 1527, em St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Milbourne родилась около 1474 г. в местности бургилл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Baskerville, 36. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Sir Thomas Monington. Она умерла 29 марта 1527 г. в местности ст брявелс, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности ст брявелс, глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Milbourne nació aproximadamente 1474, en Burghill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Simon Milbourne Sheriff Of Herefordshire, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Jane Baskerville, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Sir Thomas Monington. Murió el 29 de marzo de 1527, en St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en St Briavels, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
